verses.text: Topa in Moses kiangah
“Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Hihlo ding ci-in Topa in a thupiakte khat peuhpeuh, mi khatpeuh in theihlohna hangin khial a, tuate khatpeuh a hihkhak leh

a khialpa pen sathau a kinilh siampipa ahih a, mite tungah tua bangin mawhna hong tut leh, ama gamtatnasa a khialhna hangin a sitbaanglo bawngtalno khat Topa' mai-ah khialhna hanga biakna-in amah piasak un
Amah in Topa' mai kikhopna buk kongah a bawngtal paipihin, bawngtal lu tungah a khut nga ding a, Topa' mai-ah a bawngtal go ding hi
Tua ciangin sathau a kinilh siampipa in a bawngtal si tawmkhat la-in, kikhopna bukah paipih ding hi
Tua ciangin siampipa in a si sungah a khutme diahin, biakbuk dalna puan mai Topa' mai-ah a si kimkhat sagih vei theh ding hi
Tua ciangin siampipa in kikhopna buk sung Topa' mai-a om paknamtui biakna tau kite a si kimkhat nuhin, kikhopna bukkongah a om meihal biakna tau bulah bawngtal si a omlai teng sungkhia ding hi
Tua ciangin amah in khialhna hanga biakna bawngtal thau khempeuh a gilpi tuam a thau leh a sungkuate tunga om a thau khempeuh tawh

a kawnga om a kal nihte a thau tawh, a kalte tawh a lakkhiat khop ding a sintuamte(thunuama biakna bawngtal panin hihte a kilak mah bangin) la ding a, siampipa in meihal biakna tau tungah tuate hal ding hi
Ahih hangin bawngtal vun leh a sa khempeuh, a lutang, a khete, a sungkuate, leh a ek tawh
a bawngtal buppi puakhia-in vut kibuakna, giahphual pualam mun siangtho khatah sing a kicih mei tungah amah in hal ding a, vut a kibuakna munah kihal ding hi
“Israel mihonte khempeuh in theihlohna hangin khialhna khat gamta-in tua pen mihonte in a phawk kei a, hihlo ding, ci-in Topa in a thupiakte khat peuhpeuh amaute in hihin a mawh uh leh
amau' gamtatnasa khialhna a kitheih ciangin, khialhna hanga biakna dingin mihonte in bawngtalno khat pia-in kikhopna buk mai-ah paipih ding uh hi
Tua ciangin mihonte' upate in Topa' mai, bawngtal lu tungah amau' khut nga ding uh a, Topa' mai-ah tua bawngtal kigo ding hi
Tua ciangin sathau a kinilh siampipa in kikhopna bukah bawngtal si kimkhat paipih ding a
a si sungah a khutme diahin dalna puan mai Topa' mai-ah sagih vei theh ding hi
Tua ciangin amah in Topa' mai kikhopna buk sunga om biakna tau kite tungah a si kimkhat zut ding a, kikhopna bukkongah a om biakna tau bulah si a omlai teng sung ding hi
Tua ciangin amah in a thau khempeuh la-in biakna tau tungah hal ding hi
Tua bangin a bawngtal hih ding hi. Amah in khialhna hanga biakna bawngtal a hihsa mah bangin hih zong hih ding hi. Siampipa in amau-a' dingin kilemna bawlsak ding a, amaute kimaisak ding hi
Amah in giahphual pua-ah bawngtal puakhia ding a, a masa bawngtal a hal mah bangin a hal ding hi. Tua pen mihonpi-a' dingin khialhna hanga biakna ahi hi
“Ukpa khat khialin, hihlo ding, ci-in Topa ama Pasian in a thupiakte khempeuh lakah khat peuhpeuh theihlohna hangin hihkha-in a mawh ciangin
ama gamtatnasa khialhna ama tungah a va kihilh leh, amah in biakna-in a sitbaanglo keel pa khat paipih ding a
keel lu tungah a khut nga-in, Topa' mai, meihal biakna a kigawhna ding munah go ding hi. Tua pen khialhna hanga biakna ahi hi
Tua ciangin siampipa in a khutme tawh khialhna hanga biakna si tawm la-in meihal biakna tau kite nuhin meihal biakna tau bulah a si omlai teng sung ding hi
Thunuama biakna sathaute mah bangin amah in biakna tau tungah a thau khempeuh hal ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin siampipa in ama khialhna hangin kilemna bawlsak ding a, amah kimaisak ding hi
“Hihlo ding, ci-in Topa' thupiakte khat peuhpeuh mi mawkmawk khat in theihlohna hangin hihin a khialh a, a mawh leh
ama gamtatnasa a khialhna ama tungah a kihilh ciangin amah in a gamtatnasa a khialhna hangin biakna ding a sitbaanglo keel a nu khat paipih ding hi
Amah in a khialhna hanga biakna ganhing lu tungah a khut nga-in, meihal biakna munah khialhna hanga biakna go ding hi
Siampipa in a khutme tawh si tawm la-in meihal biakna tau kite nuh ding a, biakna tau bulah si a omlai teng sung ding hi

Thunuama biakna panin a thaute a kilakkhiat mah bangin amah in a thau khempeuh lakhia ding a, Topa-a' ding a gim namtui dingin siampipa in biakna tau tungah hal ding hi. Siampipa in ama-a' dingin kilemna bawlsak ding a, amah kimaisak ding hi
“Amah in khialhna hanga biakna-in a piak dingin tuuno khat a paipih leh, a sitbaanglo a nu khat hi ding a
khialhna hanga biakna ganhing lu tungah a khut nga-in, meihal biakna a kigawhna munah khialhna hanga biakna dingin go ding hi
Tua ciangin siampipa in khialhna hanga biakna si tawmkhat a khutme tawh la-in meihal biakna tau kite nuh ding a, biakna tau bulah a si omlai teng sung ding hi

Thunuama biakpiakna panin tuuno thau a kilak khiat mah bangin amah in a thau khempeuh lakhia ding a, Topa' tungah mei tawh kihal biakna, biakna tau tungah siampipa in hal ding hi. Siampipa in ama gamtatnasa a khialhna hangin kilemna bawlsak ding a, amah kimaisak ding hi.
